info.title: Verdan Skoleadministrasjon API
info.description:
REST API for Verdan skoleadministrasjonssystem. Støtter multi-institusjon med rollebasert tilgangskontroll (SUPER_ADMIN, INSTITUTION_ADMIN, TEACHER, STUDENT).

Alle endepunkter (unntatt `/api/login`, `/api/auth/refresh` og `/api/health`) krever JWT Bearer-token i `Authorization`-headeren.

Access-tokens utløper etter 15 minutter. Bruk `/api/auth/refresh` for å fornye.

200.description: Login successful, returns JWT token and user info

403.description: Students can only view own profile

post.summary: Batch transfer existing students to this institution via CSV/Excel (VGS ADMIN)
post.description: Reads a CSV/Excel file with columns: epost (or brukernavn), linje, trinn. Finds existing students by email/username and moves them to the calling admin's institution. Students keep their credentials, grades, and history. Uses all-or-nothing validation.

file.description: CSV or Excel file with columns: epost, linje, trinn

errors.description: Validation errors (if any, entire batch is rejected)

get.summary: Get grades and attendance from student's previous institution (ADMIN)
get.description: Returns the transfer history for a student who was transferred from another institution. Includes grades and attendance records from the previous school.

200.description: Transfer history with grades and attendance from previous institution

get.summary: List grades (filtered by role and institution)

409.description: Student already has a grade in this subject

get.summary: Get education history for logged-in student

200.description: Education history with grades per institution

get.summary: List attendance (filtered by role and institution)
Get own absence statistics per subject (STUDENT)

200.description: Absence stats per subject with barometer data

get.summary: Get detailed absence statistics for a student (ADMIN/TEACHER)

200.description: Detailed absence stats with program thresholds

get.summary: Search subjects by name or code
Get teachers and students assigned to a subject

post.summary: Assign a user to a subject (ADMIN)

delete.summary: Remove a user from a subject (ADMIN)

get.summary: Get API metrics per endpoint (ADMIN only)

200.description: Per-endpoint request count, avg/max duration, error rate
List of graduated students with program info
List of students eligible for promotion
Available programs with open admission periods

get.summary: Get admission portal listings for the student's level
get.description: Returns all open admission periods visible to the current user. Filters by fromLevel (institution level the student is graduating from).

200.description: List of student's applications with status

put.description: Student confirms they accept this offer. All other pending applications are automatically withdrawn.

get.summary: List admission periods for this institution (ADMIN)

put.description: Reopens a closed period. Requires a new future-dated end date.

newEndDate.description: New deadline (must be in the future)

400.description: Deadline must be in the future

post.summary: Process applications — accept/reject based on seats and requirements (ADMIN)
Enroll confirmed students into the program (ADMIN)
post.description: Creates ProgramMember entries for all CONFIRMED applications. Handles cross-level transfers (e.g. ungdomsskole→VGS at VG1) and same-level transfers (e.g. VGS→VGS at VG3 for påbygg).
